name: Snow Pea & Pear Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine yogurt, pineapple juice, and sugar in a bowl. Stir well and set aside.
2. Cook snow peas in a small amount of boiling water for 15 seconds. Drain well.
3. Cut the pear lengthwise, core, and slice lengthwise into thin pieces. Brush with lime juice.
4. Arrange snow peas and pears on each of four radicchio-lined salad plates.
5. Drizzle each plate with 1 1/2 teaspoons of the yogurt mixture.
6. Sprinkle with green onions and walnuts.
